effect.insurgence.overworld_curse.desc: Feel the curse of the Overworld
effect.insurgence.nether_curse.desc: Feel the heat of the Nether
effect.insurgence.end_curse.desc: Feel the strange air of the End
effect.insurgence.haven_blessing.desc: Feel the welcoming air of the Haven
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.title: Luck Bonus
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.desc: Increases your luck when you get more points from collecting cards of high rarity. Bonus luck will grant better loot! (Only the strongest bonus will apply)
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_1: With at least 300 points: grants 1 additional luck
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_2: With at least 400 points: grants 3 additional luck
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_3: With at least 500 points: grants 5 additional luck
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_4: With at least 600 points: grants 7 additional luck
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_5: With at least 700 points: grants 9 additional luck
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_6: With at least 900 points: grants 11 additional luck
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.desc: Increases your maximum health for every set of cards you have completed, regardless of rarity.
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.swor: By completing the Swords collection: grants 5 hearts
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.stav: By completing the Staves collection: grants 5 hearts
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.cups: By completing the Cups collection: grants 5 hearts
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.ring: By completing the Rings collection: grants 5 hearts
tooltip.insurgence.info.token_of_renewal: Refreshes the loot in a Vault for all players.
tooltip.insurgence.info.wayfinder_patter: Also found applied to looted equipment everywhere.
tooltip.insurgence.info.shaper_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment everywhere.
tooltip.insurgence.info.host_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment everywhere.
tooltip.insurgence.info.raiser_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment everywhere.
tooltip.insurgence.info.flow_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment in the Overworld.
tooltip.insurgence.info.bolt_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment in the Overworld.
tooltip.insurgence.info.rib_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment in the Nether.
tooltip.insurgence.info.snout_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment from __.
tooltip.insurgence.info.dune_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment from deserts.
tooltip.insurgence.info.coast_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment from oceans & beaches
tooltip.insurgence.info.sentry_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment from dark forests
tooltip.insurgence.info.wild_pattern_2: Also found applied to looted equipment from jungles
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_fuel: Used to power the Nether Portal one time.
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_1: Consumes Nether Fuel to allow temporary travel to The Nether.
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_2: The portal will teleport you to a random location each time,
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_3: and it will teleport all entities in a 5 block radius together.
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_4: Your visit to The Nether will be limited in time.
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_5: When your time has run out, you will be teleported back to the Nether Portal.
tooltip.insurgence.info.unused_item: This is an unused item. It has no purpose.
tooltip.insurgence.lore.card_of_swords: Earned through a demonstration of Strength.
tooltip.insurgence.lore.card_of_staves: Earned through a demonstration of Wisdom.
tooltip.insurgence.lore.card_of_cups: Earned through a demonstration of Agility.
tooltip.insurgence.lore.card_of_rings: Earned through a demonstration of Wealth.
tooltip.insurgence.lore.the_universe: The lands, skies, and depths of %s submit to you.
tooltip.insurgence.lore.poking_stick: You may find that creatures do not enjoy being poked.
tooltip.insurgence.lore.heaviest_core: Jumping is for the those with strong legs. It is possible that yours are not strong enough.
tooltip.insurgence.debug_ticket.no_data: No custom data attached to this item. It does nothing :(
tooltip.insurgence.debug_ticket.world_ti: Sets your world tier to Haven.
Sets your world tier to Frontier.
Sets your world tier to Ascent.
Sets your world tier to Summit.
Sets your world tier to Pinnacle.
gateway_failure.insurgence.failed_gatewa: Interact with the shrine to try again
actionbar.insurgence.token_of_renewal.su: Refreshed the content of this vault for all players.
actionbar.insurgence.token_of_renewal.er: Can only use this item on an inactive Vault.
actionbar.insurgence.nether_portal.incor: Portal can only activate in the Haven.
chat_message.insurgence.nether.flavor.fi: The dark magic you used to get here is only temporary.
Your body and soul will eventually be pulled out of this place.
chat_message.insurgence.nether.flavor.en: You cannot withstand the Nether forever...
Do you need to go any deeper?
You find yourself in an unfamiliar location...
chat_message.insurgence.nether.time.firs: You have %s of time in the Nether.
chat_message.insurgence.nether.time.half: You have used half your time in the Nether.
chat_message.insurgence.nether.time.one_: You will return from the Nether in 1 minute.
chat_message.insurgence.nether.time.ten_: You will return from the Nether in 10 seconds!
chat_message.insurgence.set_world_tier_h: Your world tier has upgraded to Haven!
chat_message.insurgence.set_world_tier_f: Your world tier has upgraded to Frontier!
chat_message.insurgence.set_world_tier_a: Your world tier has upgraded to Ascent!
chat_message.insurgence.set_world_tier_s: Your world tier has upgraded to Summit!
chat_message.insurgence.set_world_tier_p: Your world tier has upgraded to Pinnacle!
chat_message.insurgence.gateway_shrine.n: Shrine does not have an enemy type set. Set one using a renamed Name Tag in creative mode.
chat_message.insurgence.debug_ticket_wro: Please use the Debug Ticket in the main hand.
chat_message.insurgence.debug_ticket_no_: This Debug Ticket has no function associated with it.
Multiplier for the speed at which players can break blocks.
attribute.name.player.block_interaction_: The range of blocks in which players can interact with blocks.
attribute.name.player.entity_interaction: The range of blocks in which players can interact with entities.
Factor to speed up block breaking when using the correct tool.
attribute.name.player.sneaking_speed.des: Percentage of the player's movement speed when sneaking or crawling.
attribute.name.player.submerged_mining_s: Percentage of the player's mining speed when mining underwater.
attribute.name.player.sweeping_damage_ra: Percentage of damage which gets applied to targets of a sweep attack.
attribute.name.generic.burning_time.desc: How long you remain on fire after being ignited.
attribute.name.generic.explosion_knockba: Percentage of knockback from explosions resisted.
attribute.name.generic.fall_damage_multi: Multiplier for the amount of fall damage taken.
attribute.name.generic.gravity.desc: The amount of gravity affecting the player. Measured in blocks/tick^2.
attribute.name.generic.jump_strength.des: The initial vertical velocity when jumping. Measured in blocks/tick^2.
attribute.name.generic.max_absorption.de: The maximum amount of health that can be obtained from the absorption effect.
attribute.name.generic.movement_efficien: Factor to speed up movement on blocks which slow entities down.
attribute.name.generic.oxygen_bonus.desc: Increases the chance that air does not decrease underwater.
attribute.name.generic.safe_fall_distanc: The number of blocks before fall damage begins to accumulate.
attribute.name.generic.step_height.desc: The number of blocks that can be stepped up without jumping.
attribute.name.generic.water_movement_ef: Percentage of the player's movement speed when underwater.
attribute.irons_spellbooks.max_mana.desc: The maximum amount of mana the player can have.
